title: Operators back 30-day visa return
desc: Tourism operators in Phuket and Pattaya backed the government's decision to restore 30-day visa-free stays, saying the move would help curb illegal businesses and low-spending long-stay visitors.
title_cn: 旅游业者支持恢复30天免签入境政策
summary_cn: 泰国政府恢复30天免签入境政策得到普吉岛(Phuket)和芭提雅(Pattaya)旅游业者的广泛支持。他们认为这一举措有利于制止非法商业活动和灰色经济，同时能防止低消费长期滞留游客大量涌入，进而改善旅游产业的整体质量和市场秩序。
desc_original: Tourism operators in Phuket and Pattaya backed the government's decision to restore 30-day visa-free stays, saying the move would help curb illegal businesses and low-spending long-stay visitors.

title: Thai airlines grapple with jet fuel surge
desc: Despite increased airfares, airlines have been unable to absorb rising jet fuel costs during the summer period, with this expense increasing from 30-35% of operational costs to 60% in May.
title_cn: 泰国航空公司应对燃油成本暴增
summary_cn: 随着夏季到来，喷气燃料价格出现急剧上升，泰国各大航空公司面临前所未有的经营挑战。燃油成本占运营成本的比例从通常的30-35%急升至5月的60%，这一幅度的增长即使在提高机票价格的情况下也难以完全抵消，航空业困难日趋加重。
desc_original: Despite increased airfares, airlines have been unable to absorb rising jet fuel costs during the summer period, with this expense increasing from 30-35% of operational costs to 60% in May.

title: Higher electricity prices to hit large Thai families
desc: Large households and small businesses operating from residential properties are expected to face higher electricity bills from July, as the government prepares to roll out a new tariff system.
title_cn: 泰国电价将上调 大型家庭和住宅小商户7月起受影响
summary_cn: 泰国政府计划从7月起正式推行新的电力关税体系，调整后将对大型家庭和在住宅经营的小型企业造成显著影响，这些群体将面临电费账单的明显增加。此项政策调整涉及广泛的普通家庭和小商户，将直接影响他们的日常生活成本和经营开支。
desc_original: Large households and small businesses operating from residential properties are expected to face higher electricity bills from July, as the government prepares to roll out a new tariff system.

title: Replacing non-visa entry with tourist visa for structural security
desc: Growing security threats and transnational crime are fueling calls for Thailand to phase out visa-free entry and introduce a stricter tourist visa system to strengthen border control standards. PATTAYA, Thailand – The implementation of visa-free entry policies has historically served as a short term marketing tool utilized by governments to stimulate economic figures and boost tourism statistics. However within the contemporary global landscape which is increasingly complicated by transnational crime and emerging security threats this open border approach creates significant vulnerabilit
title_cn: 泰国拟用旅游签证替代免签入境 强化边境安全
summary_cn: 面对日益严峻的跨国犯罪和安全威胁，泰国的政策制定者和安全部门提议放弃传统的免签入境政策，转而实施更加严格的旅游签证制度。新的签证政策旨在通过强化边境管控标准和审核机制来提升国家安全防护水平，有效防范涉外犯罪风险。
desc_original: Growing security threats and transnational crime are fueling calls for Thailand to phase out visa-free entry and introduce a stricter tourist visa system to strengthen border control standards. PATTAYA, Thailand – The implementation of visa-free entry policies has historically served as a short term marketing tool utilized by governments to stimulate economic figures and boost tourism statistics. title: Pattaya officials inspect fire-damaged hotel after rooftop blaze forces mass evacuation
desc: Pattaya officials inspect the rooftop of JA Plus Hotel after a late-night blaze forced over 200 guests to evacuate in panic. PATTAYA, Thailand – City officials have launched an urgent inspection of the JA Plus Hotel in Pattaya following a serious rooftop fire that triggered chaotic evacuations and left multiple tourists injured. The blaze broke out on the rooftop (7th floor) of the hotel on Pattaya North Road, late on May 21. At the time of the incident, more than 200 guests across 120 occupied rooms were staying inside the 173-room building. Panic erupted as thick smoke quickly spread from th
title_cn: 芭提雅 JA Plus 酒店屋顶大火 200多游客紧急疏散
summary_cn: 5月21日晚间，位于芭提雅(Pattaya)北路的 JA Plus 酒店屋顶(7楼)突然发生火灾，浓烟迅速蔓延。当时该173间房的酒店内有120间客房被占用，超过200名游客在混乱中被紧急疏散。多名游客在疏散过程中受伤，酒店建筑严重受损，相关部门随后对酒店进行了全面检查。
desc_original: Pattaya officials inspect the rooftop of JA Plus Hotel after a late-night blaze forced over 200 guests to evacuate in panic. title: German tourist stranded on Jomtien Beach for weeks after wallet theft, pleads for embassy help
desc: A German tourist found in a distressed state on Jomtien Beach after allegedly losing his wallet and cards, leaving him stranded for weeks while seeking embassy assistance to return home. PATTAYA, Thailand – A German tourist has reportedly been living in distress on Jomtien Beach for nearly five weeks after his wallet and credit cards were stolen, leaving him without money, accommodation, or means to return home. On May 22, a local reporter visited the area found the foreign man in a visibly weakened condition, surviving without stable access to food or drinking water. The team provided initial
title_cn: 德国游客因钱包失窃滞留芭提雅近五周，紧急求助大使馆
summary_cn: 一名德国游客在芭提雅钟美廷海滩（Jomtien Beach）因钱包和信用卡被盗，已流落近五周，缺乏食物、饮用水和住所。5月22日记者发现其身体虚弱，正在寻求使馆帮助返回德国。

title: ‘Poramet’ launches post-term campaign in Pattaya, unveils goals under ‘Do it, done, continue’ vision
desc: Pattaya mayoral candidate Poramet Ngampichet launches his post-term campaign in Soi Thepprasit, promoting a “3 Goals, 33 Policies” plan focused on continuity, infrastructure, and citywide development. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya mayoral candidate Poramet Ngampichet has officially kicked off his campaign following the end of his term, unveiling a new political roadmap built around “3 Goals, 33 Policies” under the slogan “Do It, Done, Continue.” On his first day back on the campaign trail, Pramote visited residents in Soi Thepprasit 11, accompanied by City Council candidates from Constituency 4,
title_cn: 芭提雅市长候选人普拉美特启动竞选活动，推出「行动、完成、继续」政策规划
summary_cn: 芭提雅市长候选人普拉美特宣布任期后竞选活动正式启动，在特帕西特巷（Soi Thepprasit）与居民互动。他推出「3个目标、33项政策」计划，强调基础设施建设和全市发展的连续性。

title: Huay Yai Police arrest 9 in armed revenge attack on Pattaya rental rooms overnight
desc: Huay Yai police arrest nine suspects after a swift manhunt following a violent armed gang attack on a Pattaya rental property that left two people seriously injured. PATTAYA, Thailand – Huay Yai police have swiftly tracked down and arrested nine suspects linked to a violent armed gang attack on a rental property in Pattaya, following what authorities described as a “lightning-fast” investigation. Under the direction of Pol. Col. Warawut Nittayawan, Superintendent of Huay Yai Police Station, investigators moved quickly to trace and apprehend those involved after the late-night assault on May 22
title_cn: 淮爷警察快速破获武装复仇袭击案，一夜逮捕9名嫌疑人
summary_cn: 淮爷警察局在5月22日午夜进行了一次「闪电式」追捕行动，成功逮捕9名涉嫌武装帮派袭击芭提雅出租房屋的嫌疑人。此次袭击导致两人严重受伤。

title: Armed gang storms Pattaya rental compound, elderly landlord and nephew left seriously injured
desc: Blood stains the ground at a Huay Yai rental complex after a gang of more than 20 armed youths allegedly stormed the property and violently attacked a landlord and his nephew late at night. PATTAYA, Thailand – A violent late-night attack in Huay Yai left a 64-year-old landlord and his nephew seriously injured after a gang of more than 20 armed youths allegedly stormed a rental property and launched a brutal assault following an earlier dispute. Police from Huay Yai Station were called to the scene at a rental complex in east Pattaya, shortly before midnight on May 21. Rescue workers found 34-y
title_cn: 武装帮派突袭芭提雅出租房屋，年长房东及侄子遭重伤
summary_cn: 超过20名武装青年在5月21日晚上突袭了淮爷地区（Huay Yai）一处出租房屋，导致64岁房东和34岁侄子严重受伤。警察已到现场处理，此事系早前纠纷引发的报复性袭击。

title: Thailand rushes emergency tourist protection measures after Pattaya hotel fire injures four
desc: Minister Supamas Isarabhakdi orders an emergency consumer complaint center in Pattaya following the Sunday JA Plus Hotel fire, vowing full protection and compensation support for affected tourists. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s Office of the Consumer Protection Board (OCPB) has launched a special emergency complaint center in Pattaya following the fire at the Sunday JA Plus Hotel on Pattaya Third Road, where four people were injured and hundreds of guests were evacuated overnight, May 22. Minister Attached to the Prime Minister’s Office Supamas Isarabhakdi ordered the urgent response, directi
title_cn: 泰国在芭提雅 Pattaya 酒店火灾事故后紧急推出游客保护措施
summary_cn: 芭提雅第三路 Pattaya Third Road 的 Sunday JA Plus Hotel 于5月22日发生火灾，造成4人受伤，数百名客人连夜撤离。泰国总理府消费者保护委员会在芭提雅紧急设立投诉中心，副总理素玛丝·依沙罕巴迪 Supamas Isarabhakdi 下令迅速应对，为受影响游客提供全面保护和赔偿支持。
desc_original: Minister Supamas Isarabhakdi orders an emergency consumer complaint center in Pattaya following the Sunday JA Plus Hotel fire, vowing full protection and compensation support for affected tourists. title: Indian tourists lose sleep as hundreds of toads invade Krabi resort after heavy rain
desc: Plastic bags in hand, Krabi tourist police patrol resort gardens at night hunting dozens of croaking toads after sleepless Indian tourists pleaded for help in rain-soaked Ao Nang. KRABI, Thailand – An unusual invasion of noisy toads at a resort in Ao Nang left Indian tourists unable to sleep, prompting tourist police in Krabi to launch a late-night rescue mission to remove the amphibians from the property, May 21. Following days of heavy rain, flooded areas around Ao Nang in Krabi province became a breeding ground for reptiles and amphibians emerging from nearby natural areas. Among them were
title_cn: 印度游客遭数百只蛙类入侵甲米度假村致失眠
summary_cn: 甲米奥南 Ao Nang 地区在数日暴雨后，大量蛙类和两栖动物从周边自然区域涌入度假村园区，青蛙的持续叫声导致印度游客严重失眠。甲米旅游警察在游客求助后展开夜间救援行动，拿着塑料袋进行大规模捕捉工作，清除园区内的几十只青蛙。

title: Thai Public Health Ministry coordinates with airlines as Ebola border checks increase
desc: Deputy Government Spokesperson Lalida Pertwiwattana announces enhanced health screening measures for travellers from Congo and Uganda following Thailand’s upgraded Ebola risk alert, emphasizing strict entry controls and public safety readiness. PATTAYA, Thailand – The Thai government has stepped up health screening measures for international arrivals after the Royal Gazette announced that the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda have been declared areas infected with an “dangerous communicable disease” due to Ebola virus concerns. The designation took effect on May 21, following a publi
title_cn: 泰国卫生部协调航空公司应对埃博拉边境检查强化
summary_cn: 泰国政府在皇家公报宣布刚果民主共和国 Democratic Republic of the Congo 和乌干达 Uganda 为埃博拉病毒「危险传染病」地区后，加强了国际入境者的健康筛查措施。自5月21日起生效，副政府发言人拉莉达·珀提维瓦塔纳 Lalida Pertwiwattana 强调采取严格的入境管制和公共卫生防范措施。

title: PM Anutin begins visit to France
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul began his official visit to France on Friday with a series of high-level meetings focused on energy security, cultural diplomacy and economic cooperation.
title_cn: 总理阿努廷开始法国访问
summary_cn: 泰国总理素·诗林察 Anutin Charnvirakul 于5月22日周五开始对法国的正式访问。此次访问将重点围绕能源安全、文化外交和经济合作等议题进行一系列高层会晤，旨在加强泰法两国在战略、文化和贸易领域的深层合作。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul began his official visit to France on Friday with a series of high-level meetings focused on energy security, cultural diplomacy and economic cooperation.

title: People’s Party leader says ‘blue regime’ stifles Thailand
desc: People’s Party leader Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut has warned that Thailand remains under a “blue regime” that concentrates power in the hands of elites, as he called for the creation of a new “politics of hope” through the drafting of a new constitution.
title_cn: 人民党领袖称「蓝色政权」压制泰国
summary_cn: 人民党领袖纳泰蓬·瑞恩潘雅武 Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut 警告泰国仍处于集中权力在精英手中的「蓝色政权」统治之下。他呼吁创造新的「希望政治」，通过起草新宪法实现权力结构的根本性改革，打破既有的权力垄断格局，扩大普通民众的政治参与空间。
desc_original: People’s Party leader Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut has warned that Thailand remains under a “blue regime” that concentrates power in the hands of elites, as he called for the creation of a new “politics of hope” through the drafting of a new constitution.

title: Pattaya hotel temporarily closed for safety after fire
desc: PATTAYA - A hotel damaged by fire was ordered closed by Pattaya City on Friday for safety pending a comprehensive check by engineers for any damage to the structure.
title_cn: 火灾后芭提雅酒店临时关闭进行安全检查
summary_cn: 芭提雅市一家酒店因火灾受损，市政府于周五下令临时关闭，待工程师进行全面安全检查以评估结构损坏情况。
desc_original: PATTAYA - A hotel damaged by fire was ordered closed by Pattaya City on Friday for safety pending a comprehensive check by engineers for any damage to the structure.

title: 驻泰国大使张建卫在泰国媒体发表署名文章《中国必然统一势不可挡》
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月21日，驻泰国大使张建卫在泰国《每日新闻》《曼谷商报》和经理人在线网站等发表署名文章《中国必然统一势不可挡》，全文如下： 近期，世界目光聚焦东方。2026年4月10日，中共中央总书记习近平在北京亲切会见了中国国民党主席郑丽文率领的访问团；5月13日至15日，应习近平主席邀请，美国总统特朗普对中国进行国事访问。这两件大事让世界的目光再次聚焦到一个核心问题——台湾问题。 一、中华民族团结统一的历史大势不可阻挡 4月的北京春意盎然，习近平总书记与国民党主席郑丽文的历史性会面，奏响了中华民族致力于团结统一的强音。习近平总书记深刻指出，两岸同胞同属中华民族，包括台湾同胞在内的各族人民共同缔造了统一的多民族国家，共同书写了辉煌的中国历史，共同创造了灿烂的中华文明，也铸就了国土不可分、国家不可乱、民族不可散、文明不可断的共同信念。 在会晤中，习近平总书记就两岸关系发展提出了四点意见：坚持以正确认同促进心灵契合，坚持以和平发展守护共同家园，坚持以交流融合增进民生福祉，坚持以团结奋斗实现中华民族伟大复兴。他强调，无论国际形势、台海局势如何变化，中华民族伟大复兴的大趋势不会改变，两岸同胞走亲走近、走到一起的大潮流不会改变。我们愿在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上，同台湾各政党、团体和社会各界人士一道，加强交流对话，为两岸谋和平、为同胞谋福祉、为民族谋复兴，把两岸关系
title_cn: 驻泰国大使张建卫发表署名文章：中国统一势不可挡
summary_cn: 中国驻泰国大使张建卫在泰国媒体发表署名文章，阐述中华民族统一的历史大势。文章指出，习近平总书记4月会见中国国民党主席郑丽文，美国总统特朗普5月访华，两件大事均聚焦台湾问题。强调中华民族团结统一的历史大势不可阻挡，无论国际形势如何变化，两岸同胞走亲走近的大潮流不会改变。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月21日，驻泰国大使张建卫在泰国《每日新闻》《曼谷商报》和经理人在线网站等发表署名文章《中国必然统一势不可挡》，全文如下： 近期，世界目光聚焦东方。2026年4月10日，中共中央总书记习近平在北京亲切会见了中国国民党主席郑丽文率领的访问团；5月13日至15日，应习近平主席邀请，美国总统特朗普对中国进行国事访问。这两件大事让世界的目光再次聚焦到一个核心问题——台湾问题。 一、中华民族团结统一的历史大势不可阻挡 4月的北京春意盎然，习近平总书记与国民党主席郑丽文的历史性会面，奏响了中华民族致力于团结统一的强音。习近平总书记深刻指出，两岸同胞同属中华民族，包括台湾同胞在内的各族人民共同缔造了统一的多民族国家，共同书写了辉煌的中国历史，共同创造了灿烂的中华文明，也铸就了国土不可分、国家不可乱、民族不可散、文明不可断的共同信念。 在会晤中，习近平总书记就两岸关系发展提出了四点意见：坚持以正确认同促进心灵契合，坚持以和平发展守护共同家园，坚持以交流融合增进民生福祉，坚持以团结奋斗实现中华民族伟大复兴。他强调，无论国际形势、台海局势如何变化，中华民族伟大复兴的大趋势不会改变，两岸

title: 迪士尼迷准备冲，曼谷首办Disney Run！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 全球迪士尼粉丝期待已久的盛事——“Disney Run Thailand 2026”将于今年7月19日首次登陆曼谷，把梦幻的迪士尼魔法带到泰国粉丝的家门口。 这场风靡全球的欢乐路跑活动并非传统意义上的竞速比赛，而是一场融合运动健康与迪士尼童话的沉浸式欢乐派对。参赛者沿途将有经典迪士尼音乐相伴，还能与心爱的角色近距离互动、在特色打卡点拍照留念，彻底颠覆“跑步很累”的印象。最让粉丝们心动的，莫过于官方限定版的跑衣和完赛奖牌，设计精美，极具收藏价值。 据了解，该活动最早于1994年在美国佛罗里达州启动，旨在通过轻松有趣的方式，鼓励不同年龄层的人群一起享受运动的乐趣。以香港迪士尼乐园举办的“20th Anniversary Party Edition”为例，当时设置了多个主题赛程，包括《玩具总动员》10公里、《疯狂动物城》5公里、《冰雪奇缘》3公里以及达菲与朋友们3公里，无论是专业跑者还是亲子家庭都能参与其中，套票价格约为2700至2900泰铢，场面十分火爆。 如今，泰国粉丝不必再远赴香港或新加坡，这场全球盛事将直接在曼谷上演。据悉，“Disney Run Thailand 2026”将由专业赛事团队RUNRIO负责整体运营，并首次与UNIQLO联名推出赛事周边产品，备受瞩目。 官方目前已公布Race Pack（参赛包）领取信息：地点位于曼谷centralwOr
title_cn: 迪士尼 Disney Run 路跑活动首次登陆曼谷
summary_cn: 全球知名迪士尼路跑活动「Disney Run Thailand 2026」首次在曼谷举办，定于7月19日开始。这是融合运动健康与迪士尼童话的沉浸式活动，参赛者沿途可欣赏迪士尼音乐、与卡通角色互动、参加特色打卡并获得限定版跑衣和完赛奖牌。该活动由专业赛事团队 RUNRIO 运营，并与 UNIQLO 联合推出周边产品。

title: Russian tour guide arrested for working without licence
desc: Russian tour guide arrested for working without licence Legacy Tourist police in Phang Nga arrested a Russian national yesterday, May 21, for working illegally as a tour guide while accompanying a group of foreign tourists. The suspect, whose identity has not been released, was arrested at the car park of the Phang Nga Wildlife Breeding Station after officials earlier observed him guiding tourists at Suwan Kuha Temple. According to authorities, temple staff noticed the Russian man providing information and assistance to foreign visitors while escorting them around the site. Officials later ale
title_cn: 俄罗斯导游攀牙无证工作遭逮捕
summary_cn: 攀牙府旅游警察5月21日逮捕一名俄罗斯籍导游，其无证从事导游工作且正在带领外国游客参团。警方在攀牙野生动物繁殖站停车场逮捕嫌疑人，此前曾在素万库哈洞庙（Suwan Kuha）观察到其为外国游客提供讲解服务。

title: Phuket locals demand investigation into foreign woman in police uniform
desc: Phuket locals demand investigation into foreign woman in police uniform Legacy Residents in Phuket are calling for an investigation after a foreign woman shared photos and videos online showing herself wearing clothing resembling a Thai police uniform . The Phuket Times Facebook page posted images of the woman yesterday, May 21. In the photos, she appeared wearing a black vest featuring a Thai flag and a Royal Thai Police patch. She was also seen wearing a hat labelled “Police” and carrying a card holder displaying the Royal Thai Police Immigration Bureau logo. The vest shown in the photos is
title_cn: 普吉岛外国女子穿泰警制服引发争议
summary_cn: 普吉岛居民对一名外国女子在社交媒体上传穿着类似泰国警察制服的照片和视频感到不满，要求进行调查。女子所穿黑色背心上印有泰国国旗及皇家泰国警察徽章，还戴着标有「Police」字样的帽子，并携带印有皇家泰国警察移民局徽章的证件夹。

title: The Bangkok condo listing guide for buyers who hate wasting time
desc: The Bangkok condo listing guide for buyers who hate wasting time Legacy For foreigners looking to buy property in Thailand, Bangkok’s condo and apartment market is one of the most accessible in Asia, but the quality of what you find online varies enormously. Listings that look identical on the surface can differ in almost every meaningful way: title deed type, foreign quota availability, floor area versus usable area, management fee structure, and whether the agent you’re contacting actually represents the unit or just copied it from another platform. Knowing what to look for befor
title_cn: 曼谷公寓购房指南：快速找到合适房源的关键
summary_cn: 对于想在泰国购买房产的外国人来说，曼谷的公寓和住宅市场是亚洲最容易进入的市场之一，但在线列表的质量差异很大。看似相同的房源在产权类型、外籍购买配额、建筑面积与使用面积、管理费结构以及房产中介代理情况等方面可能存在重大差异。购房者需要学会识别这些关键因素，才能做出明智的购买决定。

title: Best places to buy Muay Thai shorts in Thailand
desc: Best places to buy Muay Thai shorts in Thailand Legacy Muay Thai shorts are one of the most recognisable pieces of kit in combat sports. Wide leg cuts, high side slits, and bold designs are built around function as much as tradition. The cut allows the hip rotation needed for kicks, knees, and defensive checks. If you are visiting Thailand to train or simply want a genuine pair to take home, buying here puts you in the right place. The market is deep, prices are better than abroad, and you can try things on before committing. The challenge is knowing where to go. Tourist stalls, night markets,
title_cn: 泰国购买泰拳短裤的最佳去处
summary_cn: 泰拳短裤是搏击运动中最标志性的装备，其宽腿剪裁和高侧开叉设计兼具功能性和传统特色，便于踢腿、膝击和防守动作。在泰国购买泰拳短裤具有独特优势：市场种类丰富、价格低于国外，且可在购买前试穿。对于来泰训练或想带回正宗泰拳短裤的游客来说，了解去哪里购买至关重要。

title: Medical emergency officer killed in Uttaradit ambulance accident
desc: Medical emergency officer killed in Uttaradit ambulance accident Legacy An ambulance accident in Uttaradit has killed a medical emergency officer after the vehicle veered off the road while responding to a car accident yesterday, May 21. The officer was identified as June, an Advanced Emergency Medical Technician (AEM) from Nam Pat Hospital in Uttaradit, who was working with the Nam Pat Rescue Association during the emergency response . Nam Pat Hospital posted a photo and tribute message today, May 22, saying, “May our younger colleague rest in peace.” Photo via โรงพยาบาลน้ำปาด จังหวัดอุตรดิตถ
title_cn: 医疗应急人员在乌隆府（Uttaradit）救护车事故中身亡
summary_cn: 5月21日，泰国北部乌隆府（Uttaradit）发生一起救护车事故，导致一名医疗应急技术员身亡。遇难者为来自南帕医院（Nam Pat Hospital）的高级应急医疗技术员朱恩（June），当时正与南帕救援协会合作参与应急救援工作。救护车在应急出车途中驶出道路，引发这起悲剧。医院随后发布讣告，表示「愿我们的年轻同事安息」。
desc_original: Medical emergency officer killed in Uttaradit ambulance accident Legacy An ambulance accident in Uttaradit has killed a medical emergency officer after the vehicle veered off the road while responding to a car accident yesterday, May 21. The officer was identified as June, an Advanced Emergency Medical Technician (AEM) from Nam Pat Hospital in Uttaradit, who was working with the Nam Pat Rescue Association during the emergency response . title: AirAsia CEO warns airport fee hike could be ‘disaster’ for Thai tourism
desc: AirAsia CEO warns airport fee hike could be ‘disaster’ for Thai tourism Legacy AirAsia founder and CEO Tony Fernandes has opposed Airports of Thailand’s (AOT) proposed increase to the international passenger service charge (PSC), warning that higher airport fees could damage Thailand’s tourism industry during a difficult period for global aviation. Fernandes, chief executive officer of Capital A, said the timing was inappropriate as airlines worldwide continue to face pressure from rising fuel prices , global conflicts, and increasing operating costs. He urged AOT to delay the new fee structur
title_cn: 亚航CEO警告机场费上调恐成泰国旅游业「灾难」
summary_cn: 亚航（AirAsia）创始人兼CEO托尼·费尔南德斯（Tony Fernandes）反对泰国机场管理局（Airports of Thailand, AOT）提议的国际乘客服务费上调。在全球航空业因燃油价格上升、地缘冲突和运营成本增加而承压的困难时期，提高机场费用可能对泰国旅游业造成重大打击。费尔南德斯呼吁AOT延迟实施新的费用结构，以保护航空业和旅游业的发展。
desc_original: AirAsia CEO warns airport fee hike could be ‘disaster’ for Thai tourism Legacy AirAsia founder and CEO Tony Fernandes has opposed Airports of Thailand’s (AOT) proposed increase to the international passenger service charge (PSC), warning that higher airport fees could damage Thailand’s tourism industry during a difficult period for global aviation. Fernandes, chief executive officer of Capital A, said the timing was inappropriate as airlines worldwide continue to face pressure from rising fuel p

title: Ex-politician linked to gambling den in Samut Prakan abandoned hotel
desc: Ex-politician linked to gambling den in Samut Prakan abandoned hotel Legacy Authorities raided an illegal gambling operation inside an abandoned hotel in Samut Prakan last night, May 21, and discovered more than 43 million baht circulating through the bank account of the alleged owner , a former local politician . Officers from the Department of Provincial Administration and the Territorial Defence Volunteers Administration Bureau conducted the raid at about 8pm on the fourth floor of the Chalermwong Hotel in Soi Suk Sawat 80, Phra Samut Chedi district, Samut Prakan. Investigators found the fl
title_cn: 前政客与沙末巴功（Samut Prakan）废弃酒店非法赌场有关联
summary_cn: 5月21日晚，泰国当局对位于沙末巴功府的恰隆翁酒店（Chalermwong Hotel）四楼非法赌场进行了突击搜查。调查显示该赌场所有者是一名前地方政客，其银行账户曾流转超过4300万泰铢。省行政部门和领土防卫志愿军管理局的官员在搜查中收缴了赌博设备。这起案件涉及公职人员腐败和非法赌博，引起广泛关注。

title: Thailand halts new Volvo EV registrations after battery defect
desc: Thailand halts new Volvo EV registrations after battery defect Legacy New registrations of the Volvo EX30 in Thailand have been suspended after the Department of Land Transport found that a recent fire involving the electric vehicle was linked to a defect in its high-voltage battery cells . The order was issued after Siripong Angkasakulkiat, deputy transport minister, instructed the Department of Land Transport to investigate the case. Thitiphat Thaijongrak, director of the Bureau of Automotive Engineering and spokesperson for the Department of Land Transport, said yesterday, May 21, that repr
title_cn: 泰国暂停沃尔沃 Volvo EX30 电动车新车注册 因电池缺陷
summary_cn: 泰国陆运厅经调查发现，沃尔沃 Volvo EX30 电动车近期发生的火灾事故与其高压电池缺陷直接相关，由此暂停了该车型在泰新车注册。陆运部副部长西里蓬·安卡萨库尔基亚特下令展开调查，汽车工程局局长蒂蒂帕特于 5 月 21 日对外宣布了这一决定。这反映出电动车安全问题日益受到重视。
desc_original: Thailand halts new Volvo EV registrations after battery defect Legacy New registrations of the Volvo EX30 in Thailand have been suspended after the Department of Land Transport found that a recent fire involving the electric vehicle was linked to a defect in its high-voltage battery cells . The order was issued after Siripong Angkasakulkiat, deputy transport minister, instructed the Department of Land Transport to investigate the case. title: 《给阿嬷的情书》连起中泰百年血脉羁绊
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月22日，没有超级巨星的加持，也没有烧钱的特效，一部制作成本仅约5000万泰铢的中国电影《给阿嬷的情书》在近期出人意料地成为了“黑马”，不仅在各大社交平台斩获了超高口碑，累计票房更是突破了35亿泰铢。很多资深电影分析师在看完这部片后，都不约而同地用“温暖又有力”来评价它。在当下习惯了用大资本、大制作和狂轰滥炸的视听特效来主导市场的电影生态里，《给阿嬷的情书》完全选择了一条相反的道路，它节奏缓慢、细水长流，却靠着最真挚的情感，直击无数观众的心底。 虽然泰国的观众可能还要再等一阵才能在本地大银幕上看到这部作品，但实际上，这部电影与“泰国人”的渊源却远比想象的深厚得多。《给阿嬷的情书》把一段海外华人带血带泪、却又充满温情的历史——“侨批”文化，作为了贯穿全片的核心故事线。在19世纪到20世纪，社会动荡迫使中国老百姓离开家乡，远渡重洋来到东南亚谋生。据历史学家估计，当时约有3400万华人移民到了这一地区，而其中绝大多数人都来自广东潮汕地区以及粤东北沿海一带。 尽管他们漂洋过海来到了暹罗（泰国的旧称），但心里那根连接家乡的线却从未真正切断。没有电话、没有网络，他们用来维持这份联系的纽带，就是“侨批”。在潮汕话里，“批”就是“信”的意思，“侨批”顾名思义，就是海外华人寄回国内的信。然而，“侨批”在当时实际上扮演了“国际银行汇款”与“跨国邮政服务”双重角色，它不仅仅是冰冷的寄
title_cn: 《给阿嬷的情书》连起中泰百年血脉羁绊
summary_cn: 中国电影《给阿嬷的情书》虽制作成本仅约 5000 万泰铢，但票房突破 35 亿泰铢，以其温暖真挚的情感打动观众。电影以「侨批」文化为核心，讲述 19 至 20 世纪华人移民的历史。据估计当时约 3400 万华人移民到东南亚，主要来自广东潮汕地区。侨批既是海外华人寄回国内的信件，也充当国际汇款和跨国邮政服务的角色，连接了漂洋过海的侨民与家乡的纽带。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月22日，没有超级巨星的加持，也没有烧钱的特效，一部制作成本仅约5000万泰铢的中国电影《给阿嬷的情书》在近期出人意料地成为了“黑马”，不仅在各大社交平台斩获了超高口碑，累计票房更是突破了35亿泰铢。很多资深电影分析师在看完这部片后，都不约而同地用“温暖又有力”来评价它。在当下习惯了用大资本、大制作和狂轰滥炸的视听特效来主导市场的电影生态里，《给阿嬷的情书》完全选择了一条相反的道路，它节奏缓慢、细水长流，却靠着最真挚的情感，直击无数观众的心底。 虽然泰国的观众可能还要再等一阵才能在本地大银幕上看到这部作品，但实际上，这部电影与“泰国人”的渊源却远比想象的深厚得多。《给阿嬷的情书》把一段海外华人带血带泪、却又充满温情的历史——“侨批”文化，作为了贯穿全片的核心故事线。在19世纪到20世纪，社会动荡迫使中国老百姓离开家乡，远渡重洋来到东南亚谋生。据历史学家估计，当时约有3400万华人移民到了这一地区，而其中绝大多数人都来自广东潮汕地区以及粤东北沿海一带。 尽管他们漂洋过海来到了暹罗（泰国的旧称），但心里那根连接家乡的线却从未真正切断。没有电话、没有网络，他们用来维持这份

title: Thai police criticised for seeking help from children during arrest
desc: Thai police criticised for seeking help from children during arrest Legacy Two high-school students in Nakhon Si Thammarat helped police restrain a suspect on a public road, prompting a debate online about the safety and appropriateness of civilian involvement in police operations. Footage of the incident was shared by TikTok user @jxjxens before being reposted by several news outlets and Facebook pages. It showed two police officers struggling with a man riding a white motorcycle in the middle of Nakhon Si Thammarat-Baan Song Road outside Chwang Rachdaphisek School. During the incident, one o
title_cn: 泰国警察因让儿童参与逮捕遭批评
summary_cn: 那空是他玛叻两名高中生在 Chwang Rachdaphisek 中学外的那空是他玛叻-班松路上，协助警察制服一名驾驶白色摩托车的嫌疑人，引发网络热议。事件视频在 TikTok 上传播后被多家新闻媒体转载，引发关于平民参与警察行动的安全性和适当性的广泛讨论。评论人士对警方利用未成年人参与执法的做法提出批评。
desc_original: Thai police criticised for seeking help from children during arrest Legacy Two high-school students in Nakhon Si Thammarat helped police restrain a suspect on a public road, prompting a debate online about the safety and appropriateness of civilian involvement in police operations. title: 泰国最具影响力的10大百年商业家族大盘点
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，想要打造一家能够跨世代成长的企业，并非易事；但若想让企业在经济、科技与时代持续变化之中，历经上百年依然存活，显然更加困难。 回顾泰国许多大型商业家族，其起点往往只是华人移民经营的小店铺，无论是药店、碾米厂、咖啡店、种子店，还是河岸贸易生意，最终都逐渐发展成为对泰国经济多个产业具有重要影响力的商业帝国。 不过，更值得关注的是，尽管这些家族的发展道路各不相同，却有一个共同点：具备与时代同步调整的能力，从代际传承、由传统业务扩展至新产业，再到把家族式公会企业转型为现代化组织。 泰国10大历史悠久的商业家族不仅打造了数千亿泰铢级商业帝国，也在数十年来深度参与了泰国经济结构、社会生活与国民记忆。 Osathanugrah家族：从小药铺到陪伴泰国人130多年的品牌 Osotspa的起点是1891年位于三聘街区的一家名为Tek Heng Yoo的杂货铺，后来开发出草药产品“麒麟标沉香水”，逐渐成为泰国家庭常备药。从药品业务发展到功能饮料M-150，再到新时代上市融资，反映出该家族并不拘泥于旧模式，并勇于将家族企业转型为现代企业，同时又不丢失原有根基。 陈簧利家族：从湄南河码头到跨世代资产管理的典范 这是一个极具研究价值的古老商业家族。其背景始于拉玛五世时期的稻米贸易、碾米与航运业，以“Huay Joo Long”之名经营，当时水路贸易正是泰国经济核心。值得注意的是，
title_cn: 泰国最具影响力的 10 大百年商业家族大盘点
summary_cn: 泰国商业家族多数源于华人移民小店铺，逐步发展成对国家经济多产业具影响力的商业帝国。Osathanugrah 家族的 Osotspa 始于 1891 年三聘街区的杂货铺，通过开发「麒麟标沉香水」、功能饮料 M-150 等产品，从传统业务扩展到现代上市融资。陈簧利家族源于拉玛五世时期的湄南河码头稻米贸易。这些百年家族通过与时代同步调整、代际传承和业务创新，打造了数千亿泰铢级商业帝国，深刻影响泰国经济结构与社会生活。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，想要打造一家能够跨世代成长的企业，并非易事；但若想让企业在经济、科技与时代持续变化之中，历经上百年依然存活，显然更加困难。 回顾泰国许多大型商业家族，其起点往往只是华人移民经营的小店铺，无论是药店、碾米厂、咖啡店、种子店，还是河岸贸易生意，最终都逐渐发展成为对泰国经济多个产业具有重要影响力的商业帝国。 不过，更值得关注的是，尽管这些家族的发展道路各不相同，却有一个共同点：具备与时代同步调整的能力，从代际传承、由传统业务扩展至新产业，再到把家族式公会企业转型为现代化组织。 泰国10大历史悠久的商业家族不仅打造了数千亿泰铢级商业帝国，也在数十年来深度参与了泰国经济结构、社会生活与国民记忆。 Osathanugrah家族：从小药铺到陪伴泰国人130多年的品牌 Osotspa的起点是1891年位于三聘街区的一家名为Tek Heng Yoo的杂货铺，后来开发出草药产品“麒麟标沉香水”，逐渐成为泰国家庭常备药。从药品业务发展到功能饮料M-150，再到新时代上市融资，反映出该家族并不拘泥于旧模式，并勇于将家族企业转型为现代企业，同时又不丢失原有根基。 陈簧利家族：从湄南

title: 2026年首季，泰国五大媒体谁挣最多，谁亏最多？
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月22日，尽管内容、活动和数字平台极大地推动了泰国媒体行业的发展，但不少上市媒体公司的业绩也反映出脆弱的经济和消费者购买力，以及高运营成本带来的压力。与此同时，广告市场和消费者争夺促使许多企业家加快调整商业模式，向活动、商务、版权管理和数字服务等新业务倾斜，以实现增长并分散风险。 随着泰国五大媒体公司2026年首季成绩单的出炉，ONEE（One31母公司）、RS集团、泰国3台（BEC World）、MONO集团和Amarin集团中，谁挣最多，谁压力最大？ ONEE（One31母公司） – 总收入：18.2852亿泰铢 – 同比变化：+24.86% – 2026年Q1净利润：4822万泰铢 – 2025年Q1净亏损：2242万泰铢 其主要收入来源包括：内容营销、偶像营销和制作业务；旗下艺人及内容IP的相关商业活动收入增长最为突出。 RS集团 – 总收入：3.334亿泰铢 – 同比变化：-19.2% – 2026年Q1净亏损：2.852亿泰铢 – 2025年Q1净亏损：2.746亿泰铢 其主要收入来源包括：商务业务和娱乐业务；RS Livewell、RS Connect（ULife）、Hato等商务业务板块贡献占比达59.8%。 泰国3台（BEC World） &#821
title_cn: 2026 年首季泰国五大媒体财务对比：谁挣最多谁亏最多
summary_cn: 2026 年首季泰国五大媒体财报出炉，表现分化明显。ONEE（One31 母公司）收入 18.29 亿泰铢，同比增长 24.86%，净利润 4822 万泰铢；RS 集团收入 3.33 亿泰铢，同比下滑 19.2%，净亏损 2.85 亿泰铢。尽管内容营销、活动和数字平台推动了媒体行业发展，但低迷经济、消费购买力下降和高运营成本对上市公司造成压力，促使企业加快调整商业模式向活动、商务、版权管理和数字服务倾斜。

title: 新加坡法院判决“速溶咖啡之父”家族自2024年底起已无权生产雀巢咖啡
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月21日，深受泰国民众喜欢和信赖的咖啡品牌雀巢（Nestlé）近日重申，公司长久以来始终坚守商业道德，不断推出高品质的新产品来满足泰国消费者的需求。同时，雀巢也一直支持泰国本地咖啡农户，已连续多年是泰国本土咖啡豆的最大买家。对于与Quality Coffee Products Co., Ltd.（QCP）的法律纠纷，公司将全力配合政府的相关司法程序。 1990年至2024年间，泰国雀巢咖啡的产品由QCP公司生产，该公司为雀巢与泰国Mahagitsiri家族各持股50%的合资企业。根据当年的合资协议，雀巢拥有QCP公司的实际管理权，涵盖雀巢咖啡的生产、分销和市场营销，且生产过程中使用的核心技术和知识产权也都归雀巢所有。随着该合资协议于2024年12月31日正式到期，QCP公司不再拥有生产雀巢咖啡产品的权利。 关于与QCP公司合作协议终止所引发的争议，此前已提交至国际仲裁庭进行审理。2024年12月20日，国际仲裁庭做出裁决，认定相关协议的终止完全符合法律和合同约定。随后，合资对方股东向新加坡法院提出的所有上诉请求，也都被依法驳回。2026年3月4日，新加坡高级法院做出终审判决，维持国际仲裁庭的裁决结果，再次确认了雀巢终止与QCP公司合同的合法性。对方股东已经获悉该判决结果，并已按照法院命令支付了相关的诉讼费用。至于Mahagitsiri家族在泰国对雀巢及其旗下子公
title_cn: 新加坡法院终审：Mahagitsiri 家族自 2024 年底无权生产雀巢咖啡
summary_cn: 雀巢与泰国 Mahagitsiri 家族成立的合资企业 QCP 自 1990 年起生产雀巢咖啡，2024 年 12 月合资协议到期。国际仲裁庭和新加坡高级法院分别于 2024 年 12 月和 2026 年 3 月做出终审判决，确认雀巢终止协议的合法性，Mahagitsiri 家族已按法院命令支付诉讼费用。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月21日，深受泰国民众喜欢和信赖的咖啡品牌雀巢（Nestlé）近日重申，公司长久以来始终坚守商业道德，不断推出高品质的新产品来满足泰国消费者的需求。同时，雀巢也一直支持泰国本地咖啡农户，已连续多年是泰国本土咖啡豆的最大买家。对于与Quality Coffee Products Co., Ltd.（QCP）的法律纠纷，公司将全力配合政府的相关司法程序。 1990年至2024年间，泰国雀巢咖啡的产品由QCP公司生产，该公司为雀巢与泰国Mahagitsiri家族各持股50%的合资企业。根据当年的合资协议，雀巢拥有QCP公司的实际管理权，涵盖雀巢咖啡的生产、分销和市场营销，且生产过程中使用的核心技术和知识产权也都归雀巢所有。随着该合资协议于2024年12月31日正式到期，QCP公司不再拥有生产雀巢咖啡产品的权利。 关于与QCP公司合作协议终止所引发的争议，此前已提交至国际仲裁庭进行审理。2024年12月20日，国际仲裁庭做出裁决，认定相关协议的终止完全符合法律和合同约定。随后，合资对方股东向新加坡法院提出的所有上诉请求，也都被依法驳回。2026年3月4日，新加坡高级法院做出

title: 人美景美，泰星NadechYaya挪威婚礼“闪晕”众人
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月21日，泰国明星夫妇Nadech和Yaya挪威婚礼现场的照片美出新级别，让网友纷纷直呼“不愧是圈内顶级天花板”！之前两人在Nadech老家孔敬办婚礼时，Yaya入乡随俗，坐上十分“接地气”的侧三轮摩托，一转眼，他们又飞到世界的另一端——女方的家乡挪威，大手笔包下帆船出海，在绝美的峡湾里上演了一出“维京后裔”的浪漫大片！ 根据北欧传统，特别是拥有维京血统的挪威人，“船”不是用来拍照打卡的时尚道具，而是代表了“灵魂与全新的征程”。Nadech和Yaya之选择在船上庆祝，背后其实藏着一个超浪漫的含义：从此两人同乘一船，执子之手、风雨同舟，共同去迎击人生路上的狂风暴雨和惊涛骇浪。这场婚礼不仅时髦，还致敬了女方家乡的文化，实在“罗曼蒂克”到了骨子里！ 从社交平台上的照片看，Nadech和Yaya颜值爆表、自带主角光环，不知道的还以为是一部偶像剧的大结局剧照呢。不过，这种绝美的氛围感，相信哪家电视台的导演来都拍不出来。粉丝追了、盼了十几年，看到这一幕，眼泪都不由自主地流下来。 （编译：KA；来源：tuddentertain、sanook） The post 人美景美，泰星NadechYaya挪威婚礼“闪晕”众人 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰星 Nadech 和 Yaya 挪威梦幻婚礼「闪晕」众人
summary_cn: 泰国明星 Nadech 和 Yaya 先后在泰国和挪威举办婚礼。女方回到家乡挪威，两人包船在美丽峡湾举办婚礼，融入维京文化传统，象征「同舟共济」的婚姻寓意。婚礼照片因两人颜值和唯美氛围获网友热赞，粉丝直呼「圈内天花板」。
